values.comment: Lift an IO Task into the REPL input monad (no-op in this implementation).

values.name: liftInputT
values.comment: Lift a Task into the REPL input monad (no-op in this implementation).

values.name: lines
values.comment: Split a string into lines at newline characters.

values.name: listGroupBy
values.comment: Group consecutive elements in a list that satisfy the binary predicate.
values.type: (a -> a -> Basics.Bool) -> List.List a -> List.List (List.List a)

values.name: listLookup
values.comment: Look up a key in an association list, returning the first matching value.
values.type: a -> List.List ( a, b ) -> Maybe.Maybe b

values.name: listMaximum
values.comment: Find the maximum element in a list using the provided comparison function, crashing if the list is empty.

values.name: listTraverse
values.comment: Traverse a list with a Task-producing function, collecting results into a new list.
values.type: (a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> List.List a -> Task.Task Basics.Never (List.List b)

values.name: listTraverse_
values.comment: Traverse a list with a Task-producing function, discarding the results and returning ().
values.type: (a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> List.List a -> Task.Task Basics.Never ()

values.name: lockWithFileLock
values.comment: Execute an action while holding an exclusive file lock, releasing the lock when done.
values.type: String.String -> Utils.Main.LockSharedExclusive -> (() -> Task.Task Basics.Never a) -> Task.Task Basics.Never a

values.name: mVarDecoder
values.comment: Decoder for MVar references from binary data.

values.name: mVarEncoder
values.comment: Encoder for MVar references to binary data.

values.name: mapFindMin
values.comment: Find the minimum key-value pair in a dictionary, crashing if the dictionary is empty.
values.type: Data.Map.Dict comparable comparable a -> ( comparable, a )

values.name: mapFromKeys
values.comment: Build a dictionary from a list of keys by applying a function to each key to produce its value.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> v) -> List.List k -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k v

values.name: mapFromListWith
values.comment: Build a dictionary from a list of key-value pairs, combining values with the same key using the provided function.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (a -> a -> a) -> List.List ( k, a ) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a

values.name: mapInsertWith
values.comment: Insert a key-value pair into a dictionary, combining with existing value using the provided function if the key already exists.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (a -> a -> a) -> k -> a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a

values.name: mapIntersectionWith
values.comment: Compute the intersection of two dictionaries, combining values from both using the provided function.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> b -> c) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k b -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k c

values.name: mapIntersectionWithKey
values.comment: Compute the intersection of two dictionaries, combining values using a function that has access to the key.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (k -> a -> b -> c) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k b -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k c

values.name: mapLookupMin
values.comment: Find the minimum key-value pair in a dictionary, returning Nothing if the dictionary is empty.
values.type: Data.Map.Dict comparable comparable a -> Maybe.Maybe ( comparable, a )

values.name: mapM_
values.comment: Map a monadic function over a list, discarding the results and returning ().
values.type: (a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> List.List a -> Task.Task Basics.Never ()

values.name: mapMapKeys
values.comment: Transform all keys in a dictionary using the provided function.
values.type: (k2 -> comparable) -> (k1 -> k1 -> Basics.Order) -> (k1 -> k2) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k1 a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k2 a

values.name: mapMapMaybe
values.comment: Map a Maybe-producing function over dictionary values, keeping only the Just results.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> Maybe.Maybe b) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k b

values.name: mapMinViewWithKey
values.comment: Extract the minimum key-value pair from a dictionary, returning it along with the remaining dictionary.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (( k, a ) -> comparable) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Maybe.Maybe ( ( k, a ), Data.Map.Dict comparable k a )

values.name: mapTraverse
values.comment: Traverse a dictionary with a Task-producing function, collecting results into a new dictionary.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Data.Map.Dict comparable k b)

values.name: mapTraverseResult
values.comment: Traverse a dictionary with a Result-producing function, failing at the first error.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> Result.Result e b) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Result.Result e (Data.Map.Dict comparable k b)

values.name: mapTraverseWithKey
values.comment: Traverse a dictionary with a Task-producing function that has access to the key.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (k -> a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Data.Map.Dict comparable k b)

values.name: mapTraverseWithKeyResult
values.comment: Traverse a dictionary with a Result-producing function that has access to the key.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (k -> a -> Result.Result e b) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Result.Result e (Data.Map.Dict comparable k b)

values.name: mapUnionWith
values.comment: Compute the union of two dictionaries, combining values with the same key using the provided function.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> a -> a) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a

values.name: mapUnions
values.comment: Compute the union of multiple dictionaries, preferring values from later dictionaries for duplicate keys.
values.type: List.List (Data.Map.Dict comparable k a) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a

values.name: mapUnionsWith
values.comment: Compute the union of multiple dictionaries, combining values with the same key using the provided function.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> (a -> a -> a) -> List.List (Data.Map.Dict comparable k a) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k a

values.name: maybeEncoder
values.comment: Encode a Maybe value to bytes using the provided encoder for the inner value.

values.name: maybeMapM
values.comment: Map a Maybe-producing function over a list, returning Nothing if any application returns Nothing.
values.type: (a -> Maybe.Maybe b) -> List.List a -> Maybe.Maybe (List.List b)

values.name: maybeTraverseTask
values.comment: Traverse a Maybe value with a Task-producing function, preserving the Maybe structure.
values.type: (a -> Task.Task x b) -> Maybe.Maybe a -> Task.Task x (Maybe.Maybe b)

values.name: newChan
values.comment: Create a new empty channel.

values.name: newEmptyMVar
values.comment: Create a new empty MVar.

values.name: newMVar
values.comment: Create a new MVar with an initial value.

values.name: nodeGetDirname
values.comment: Get the directory name of the current module (Node.js \_\_dirname equivalent).

values.name: nodeMathRandom
values.comment: Generate a random float between 0 and 1 using Node.js Math.random().

values.name: nonEmptyListTraverse
values.comment: Traverse a non-empty list with a Task-producing function, preserving the non-empty structure.
values.type: (a -> Task.Task Basics.Never b) -> Compiler.Data.NonEmptyList.Nonempty a -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Compiler.Data.NonEmptyList.Nonempty b)

values.name: putMVar
values.comment: Put a value into an MVar, blocking if the MVar is already full.
values.type: (a -> Bytes.Encode.Encoder) -> Utils.Main.MVar a -> a -> Task.Task Basics.Never ()

values.name: readChan
values.comment: Read a value from a channel, blocking if the channel is empty.
values.type: Bytes.Decode.Decoder a -> Utils.Main.Chan a -> Task.Task Basics.Never a

values.name: readMVar
values.comment: Read the current value of an MVar without removing it, blocking if the MVar is empty.
values.type: Bytes.Decode.Decoder a -> Utils.Main.MVar a -> Task.Task Basics.Never a

values.name: replGetInputLine
values.comment: Read a line of input from the REPL with the given prompt, returning Nothing on EOF.

values.name: replGetInputLineWithInitial
values.comment: Read a line of input with initial text on the left and right of the cursor.

values.name: replRunInputT
values.comment: Run a REPL input task with the given settings.
values.type: Utils.Main.ReplSettings -> Utils.Main.ReplInputT System.Exit.ExitCode -> Control.Monad.State.Strict.StateT s System.Exit.ExitCode

values.name: replWithInterrupt
values.comment: Wrap a REPL action to enable interrupt handling (no-op in this implementation).

values.name: sequenceADict
values.comment: Sequence a dictionary of RResults into an RResult of a dictionary, collecting all errors and warnings.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k (Compiler.Reporting.Result.RResult i w e v) -> Compiler.Reporting.Result.RResult i w e (Data.Map.Dict comparable k v)

values.name: sequenceDictMaybe
values.comment: Sequence a dictionary of Maybes into a Maybe dictionary, returning Nothing if any value is Nothing.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k (Maybe.Maybe a) -> Maybe.Maybe (Data.Map.Dict comparable k a)

values.name: sequenceDictResult
values.comment: Sequence a dictionary of Results into a Result of a dictionary, failing at the first error.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k (Result.Result e v) -> Result.Result e (Data.Map.Dict comparable k v)

values.name: sequenceDictResult_
values.comment: Sequence a dictionary of Results, discarding the values and returning () on success.
values.type: (k -> comparable) -> (k -> k -> Basics.Order) -> Data.Map.Dict comparable k (Result.Result e a) -> Result.Result e ()

values.name: sequenceListMaybe
values.comment: Sequence a list of Maybes into a Maybe list, returning Nothing if any value is Nothing.

values.name: sequenceNonemptyListResult
values.comment: Sequence a non-empty list of Results into a Result of a non-empty list, failing at the first error.
values.type: Compiler.Data.NonEmptyList.Nonempty (Result.Result e v) -> Result.Result e (Compiler.Data.NonEmptyList.Nonempty v)

values.name: someExceptionDecoder
values.comment: Decoder for exceptions from binary data.

values.name: someExceptionEncoder
values.comment: Encoder for exceptions to binary data.

values.name: takeMVar
values.comment: Take the value from an MVar, removing it and blocking if the MVar is empty.
values.type: Bytes.Decode.Decoder a -> Utils.Main.MVar a -> Task.Task Basics.Never a

values.name: unlines
values.comment: Join a list of strings with newlines, adding a final newline at the end.

values.name: writeChan
values.comment: Write a value to a channel.
values.type: (a -> Bytes.Encode.Encoder) -> Utils.Main.Chan a -> a -> Task.Task Basics.Never ()

values.name: zipWithM
values.comment: Zip two lists with a Maybe-producing function, returning Nothing if any application returns Nothing.
values.type: (a -> b -> Maybe.Maybe c) -> List.List a -> List.List b -> Maybe.Maybe (List.List c)

name: Utils.Task.Extra

values.name: apply
values.comment:
Applies a task containing a function to a task containing a value.
This is the applicative apply operation for tasks, enabling applicative-style composition.
values.type: Task.Task x a -> Task.Task x (a -> b) -> Task.Task x b

values.name: eio
values.comment:
Converts an infallible task returning Result into a fallible task.
Maps the error value using the provided function before failing the task.
values.type: (x -> y) -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Result.Result x a) -> Task.Task y a

values.name: io
values.comment:
Converts an infallible task to a task with any error type.
Useful when an infallible IO operation needs to be used in a context expecting a fallible task.
values.type: Task.Task Basics.Never a -> Task.Task x a

values.name: mapM
values.comment:
Maps a task-returning function over a list and sequences the results.
Executes each task in sequence and collects the results into a list.
values.type: (a -> Task.Task x b) -> List.List a -> Task.Task x (List.List b)

values.name: mio
values.comment:
Converts an infallible task returning Maybe into a fallible task.
If the task produces Nothing, fails with the provided error value.
values.type: x -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Maybe.Maybe a) -> Task.Task x a

values.name: run
values.comment:
Converts a fallible task into an infallible task that returns a Result.
Captures both success and failure cases as Result values.
values.type: Task.Task x a -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Result.Result x a)

values.name: throw
values.comment:
Creates a task that immediately fails with the given error value.
Alias for Task.fail that provides clearer intent for exception-like error handling.

values.name: void
values.comment:
Discards the result of a task, replacing it with unit.
Useful when you need to execute a task for its side effects but don't care about its return value.
